name: my-git-php-formatter
description: Format changed PHP lines from git diff and optionally run on save.

commands.title: My Git PHP Formatter: Format Changed PHP Files
My Git PHP Formatter: Format Current PHP File

enumDescriptions: Disable all D group custom rules.
Run every D group custom rule.
Run only the D group rules listed in enabledRules.
myGitPhpFormatter.dGroupCustomRules.mode.description: Controls how D group custom formatting rules are applied.

enumDescriptions: Normalize whitespace around common PHP operators such as =, ===, =>, ??, &&, and ||.
Normalize PHP type cast spacing such as ( int )$value to (int) $value.

myGitPhpFormatter.dGroupCustomRules.enab.description: D group custom rules used when dGroupCustomRules.mode is set to custom.

myGitPhpFormatter.formatOnSave.description: Format only the changed PHP lines of the saved file. New files are formatted as a whole document.

myGitPhpFormatter.skipMixedHtmlDocuments.description: Skip formatting PHP files that appear to contain substantial HTML markup.

myGitPhpFormatter.debug.description: Write verbose logs to the My Git PHP Formatter output channel.

myGitPhpFormatter.showNotifications.description: Show information and warning messages for manual commands.
